_about: Per-age-band under-triage rates at the standard operating point and after applying the asymmetric 2.5x threshold multiplier. Used by report Figure 9.1 (bias_audit_disparities). Source: filtered from the overnight Azure run's bias_audit_single_axis.csv (standard) and bias_audit_with_asymmetric.csv (asymmetric_2.5x), keeping only the age_group axis. Weighted average over N reproduces the headline overall rates of 15.22% (standard) and 6.10% (asymmetric).
